attributes.description: Overview of Cato Networks event logs across all event sub-types.

params.markdown:
** Event Overview**

Summary of event activity across all Cato event sub-types. Use the links above to open specialized dashboards for firewall traffic, threat/IPS/DNS detections, or audit logs.

Covers top actions, traffic direction, geo distribution, top hosts and IPs, and authentication activity (ApiKey events).

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/cato_networks/overview)

attributes.title: [Logs Cato Networks] Event Overview
